The Hills Have Eyes (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $41,778,863Details
International Box Office $28,576,950
Worldwide Box Office $70,355,813
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $21,197,184
Total $21,197,184
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$15,708,512 (37.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.66 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:59.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$17,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,620 opening theaters/2,621 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $76,286,286

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 10th, 2006 (Wide) by Fox Searchlight
International Releases: May 11th, 2006 (Wide) (New Zealand)
Video Release: June 20th, 2006 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong gruesome violence and terror throughout, and for language.
Running Time: 107 minutes
Franchise: Hills Have Eyes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: Cannibalism, Mutants
Social setting: Hicksploitation
Subgenre: Survival Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
